title: DRW MD-DRW-510: BMS Enclosure Assembly
text:
Drawing MD-DRW-510 Rev E — BMS Enclosure Assembly

## Notes

1. All dimensions in millimetres unless stated.
2. Surface finish: Ra 3.2 unless noted.
3. Parts referenced: P-1075, P-1080, P-1081, P-1082.
4. Drawn by Rowan Ellery, checked by Lena Okafor, approved by Dr. Rhea Voss.
